### 5月7日收盘：算力与半导体主线强化，成交缩量下资金高度集中

**主线判断**  
1. **算力与AI硬件主线持续发酵**：受马斯克xAI解散并将大额GPU算力租给Anthropic事件催化，叠加存储芯片“超级周期”预期，算力租赁、存储芯片、半导体设备等细分板块集体拉升，多只个股涨停     [[E14]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiTkFVX3lxTFByTWNieDdhMmlhWU82VXV3V0UyUVBGa3pud2JRM0pUZm9WNEZNZGp6SHA5dktsbU42WVVoMExvdlRObkdqUEJBa2Q3U1luUQ?oc=5)    [[E15]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiSEFVX3lxTE1uSnFRTkFycml0OWpzU2VCOEd6V2ozOVdoQlowaG1CSjhnUGNQdmEzM0JvbUVpU1pfTi1qaVRlTGdlQXFUM1libg?oc=5)。  
2. **资金加速向科技成长股集中，但整体成交额缩量**：沪深两市成交额全天超3万亿元，但较昨日同时段缩量997亿元，显示增量资金不足，存量博弈特征明显     [[E01]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiT0FVX3lxTE9COGh3NzdJY1pfa0FsN2Z0LTNGaXg1TFFaOG1uRk9XbzBUSlBOcUtKdjEtX0JjVjYzaTJpWHlINExHUUV0TkZPOW1rOWtuTm8?oc=5)。主线内部则出现“少数个股吸血”现象，如002384单日主力资金净流入超27亿元     [[E09]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5SZ2hWVXdtTWxZZllGcHA2MTFOcEtQNHF4dlJGZjFtX3FBX19tODhZb1Zpd0QzZUxEY0hoeHJNc1hEMC1QZTE4UzFTaEs0U3BzbG1CNGl3MTR0SGQ1?oc=5)。

**证据与验证**  
- **算力与存储事件驱动**：马斯克官宣xAI解散，22万张GPU全部租赁给Anthropic，直接刺激算力租赁板块科华数据等多股涨停     [[E14]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiTkFVX3lxTFByTWNieDdhMmlhWU82VXV3V0UyUVBGa3pud2JRM0pUZm9WNEZNZGp6SHA5dktsbU42WVVoMExvdlRObkdqUEJBa2Q3U1luUQ?oc=5)    [[E04]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiS0FVX3lxTE9Ka3RuMFBOWjNOWWlnSkZSa3RnUHY3VkdXZm04ZFlzNHh3cDNXWTlSRjNxdWdzOEp2S0k5bVVHdEV5dGRhcHlRS3d6WQ?oc=5)。同时，存储芯片反复活跃，朗科科技涨超10%，澜起科技涨超6%，多家媒体称“存储芯片超级周期”来临     [[E15]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiSEFVX3lxTE1uSnFRTkFycml0OWpzU2VCOEd6V2ozOVdoQlowaG1CSjhnUGNQdmEzM0JvbUVpU1pfTi1qaVRlTGdlQXFUM1libg?oc=5)    [[E17]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBnNWNnbUtvQU1QMzd5d3haNFR4dzV2TGRxNkZnMkdMaGpMRndmRkZXV3NDQ0UyaHYwSFRIQ09sdHhkc3RGdGo0ZGJYWGJ2QTRrZW9UWGhJbVJRbzFXN2FuUA?oc=5)    [[E18]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE1XV3ROY3pKR3NCYnNYOGhCVFBvWWtwTDJUTnlaXzZTRUN4dGhVZkRXd3JNek4ycHhJQWJla25hQmttUU1jZE9WNkQ0SjFoR3cydTltUWNJTU81c0lFTzk4ZQ?oc=5)。  
- **资金面实证**：中韩半导体ETF（513310）半日成交近百亿元，机器人ETF半日涨幅超3%，显示主题ETF获得大额申购     [[E08]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMieEFVX3lxTE5QWjJIRkN3NUY0UjlTd1FER3RXQmdaLXZsVkRyczV1RThHZWF1UGViOHpCNjZLS3hHdDVwSVY1OXBEam5wZjVLZWtaZWZwdW16cWNHRG5TOGtaN2kzRV9POG4xem9zY2FLZ3JfM3NnUlcwQTN1SHB4SA?oc=5)。盘面上688525（某半导体标的）从昨收265飙升至收盘311.12，涨幅超17%，活跃游资火力集中 [盘面摘要]。  
- **国际宏观**：能源价格因伊朗谈判不明而持稳，地缘能源格局变化可能间接利好国内替代产业链     [[E02]](https://www.nytimes.com/2026/05/07/business/oil-gas-price-iran.html)（source_domain=rss.nytimes.com）。但该逻辑当前尚不构成直接催化。  

**风险与反证**  
1. **成交持续缩量后的调整压力**：当日三次披露成交额均较前日缩量（累计超2600亿），若后续量能无法回升，主线接力可能受阻     [[E01]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiT0FVX3lxTE9COGh3NzdJY1pfa0FsN2Z0LTNGaXg1TFFaOG1uRk9XbzBUSlBOcUtKdjEtX0JjVjYzaTJpWHlINExHUUV0TkZPOW1rOWtuTm8?oc=5)    [[E05]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiS0FVX3lxTE1RTXB5MWs5N1JnRk93YkNPUkxaakcxMjk0eXNrUXptMHo4WjlFMEI2a3BmVDI1aW5WN1dWNEZUcnJoZXJVNjdLZktXWQ?oc=5)    [[E07]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiS0FVX3lxTE9JNVV1NXpVVE1jQVp1ODR2cjNjcWlWOWRzeGp5X3dUZ3ZmUDBwdHpiWHdfanBMWGF1RlV3T1VqclhROEI3S1hOU3FBMA?oc=5)。  
2. **宏观地缘扰动**：特朗普访华前，美国两党参议员提出决议案要求将中国威胁列为最优先议题，可能引发中美关系阶段性紧张     [[E20]](https://news.google.?oc=5)（source_domain=news.google.com）。该信号与当前科技股的高位情绪形成潜在背离。  
3. **个股筹码松动迹象**：亚世光电、鼎捷数智等个股股东户数大幅增加（分别+18.31%、+4.00%），户均持股下降，说明散户跟风加剧，短期抛压增大     [[E06]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijAFBVV95cUxPdHVEa0N4cGFvdGFuTUNEazlCY21kTVpLQjJNM2Nsel9XcWNJWkVlTUlkcVdsS1BUdDJxZE5DV3FMNFJKbmR1UGpENm9YWmtMUzJqVnZ2Mzl2NWZqNG9qQlIwLTJnX0xSTHo0QktpVmlkcXFfNEw3VWxBdk0teHg1cEdDbndqcjJVa25iRQ?oc=5)    [[E16]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5)。  

**观察清单**  
- 算力租赁板块龙头科华数据次日能否溢价高开     [[E04]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiS0FVX3lxTE9Ka3RuMFBOWjNOWWlnSkZSa3RnUHY3VkdXZm04ZFlzNHh3cDNXWTlSRjNxdWdzOEp2S0k5bVVHdEV5dGRhcHlRS3d6WQ?oc=5)  
- 存储芯片概念（朗科科技、澜起科技）的持续性     [[E15]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiSEFVX3lxTE1uSnFRTkFycml0OWpzU2VCOEd6V2ozOVdoQlowaG1CSjhnUGNQdmEzM0JvbUVpU1pfTi1qaVRlTGdlQXFUM1libg?oc=5)    [[E17]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBnNWNnbUtvQU1QMzd5d3haNFR4dzV2TGRxNkZnMkdMaGpMRndmRkZXV3NDQ0UyaHYwSFRIQ09sdHhkc3RGdGo0ZGJYWGJ2QTRrZW9UWGhJbVJRbzFXN2FuUA?oc=5)  
- 002384（光模块）若继续获主力净流入，可能带动通信板块     [[E09]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE5SZ2hWVXdtTWxZZllGcHA2MTFOcEtQNHF4dlJGZjFtX3FBX19tODhZb1Zpd0QzZUxEY0hoeHJNc1hEMC1QZTE4UzFTaEs0U3BzbG1CNGl3MTR0SGQ1?oc=5)  
- 以半导体ETF（513310）成交额作为资金情绪温度计     [[E08]](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMieEFVX3lxTE5QWjJIRkN3NUY0UjlTd1FER3RXQmdaLXZsVkRyczV1RThHZWF1UGViOHpCNjZLS3hHdDVwSVY1OXBEam5wZjVLZWtaZWZwdW16cWNHRG5TOGtaN2kzRV9POG4xem9zY2FLZ3JfM3NnUlcwQTN1SHB4SA?oc=5)  
- 中美关系动向（特朗普访华前相关表态     [[E20]](https://news.google.?oc=5)）  

模拟盘笔记，非投资建议。
